titleStmt.title: SII 34.113: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 113. Tiruveṟumbūr, Tiruchirappalli Taluk, Tiruchirappalli District. On the west wall of the central shrine in the Piplikēśvara temple.

summary.p: The end portion is not available. It records assignment of a piece of land for offerings to the deity Āḻvār Tirubhuvanasundarar at Tiruveṟumbiyūr. The said land which forms part of a land that had been purchased by Sembiyan Vēydivēḷāṉ from the sabhā of the village and it was made cultivable by a saṅkarappāḍi member called Māṟandūtuvaṉ Sivapattaṉ.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . kOpparakecari panmanki yāṇṭu 10 5 Āvatu teṉkarai brahmadeyam śrīkaṇḍaccaturveti maṅkalattu tiruveṟu
mpiyūrāḷvār tiribhuvaṉasuntaraṟku cantrātittaval Uccampōtai santiyil tiruvamitu ceyya vaiytta Arici Irunā
ḻiyum kaṟiyamitoṉṟukkum neyyamitaraippiṭikkum tayiramitu Urikkum Aṭaikkāyamitu Iraṇṭum veṟṟilai Eṭṭukkumāka vaiytta ni
lamāvatu Ittēvaṟku cempiyaṉ vēyti vēḷāṉ sabhaiyār pakkal vilaikoṇṭu kiṭanta nilattil caṅkarappāṭiyāṉ māṟantūtuvaṉāṉa civapattaṉ macakkivaitta nilattukku kīḻpāṟkellai Ittēvar tiruviḷakkup
puṟattukku mēṟkum teṉpāṟkellaitiruppatiyam pāṭuvār nilattukku vaṭakkum mēlpāṟkellai Eṟumpiyūrā rellaikkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai kuṉṟappōḻaṉ macakkivaitta tiruviḷakkuc ceykkut teṟkum mivvicaitta perunāṉkel
laiyuḷakappaṭṭa nilamuṇṇi
lamoḻiviṉṟi
Digital edition of SII 34.113 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
